name: Auto-Tag
author: Carbide
description: Automatically prefixes configured words with # to create inline tags. Uses a TOML config for allow/deny lists.

name: HTML Strip
author: Carbide
description: Strip unnecessary elements (styles, scripts, metadata) from HTML files, leaving only content.

name: HTML to Markdown
author: Carbide
description: Convert HTML files in your vault to Markdown using Turndown.

name: Slides Export
author: Carbide
description: Export markdown notes as slide deck PDFs, splitting on horizontal rules (---)

name: Smart Templates
author: Carbide Community
description: Context-aware dynamic templates with Handlebars, live preview, and one-click insertion.

name: Wiki Compiler
author: Carbide
description: Compile vault notes into an interlinked wiki using LLMs
